instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.prompt: The students in Akira Miyake's study were all majoring in

options.label: physics
psychology or physics
science, technology, engineering or mathematics

questions.prompt: The aim of Miyake's study was to investigate

options.label: what kind of women choose to study physics
a way of improving women's performance in physics
whether fewer women than men study physics at college

questions.prompt: The female physics students were wrong to believe that

options.label: the teachers marked them in an unfair way
the male students expected them to do badly
their test results were lower than the male students'

questions.prompt: Miyake's team asked the students to write about

options.label: what they enjoyed about studying physics
the successful experiences of other people
something that was important to them personally

questions.prompt: What was the aim of the writing exercise done by the subjects?

options.label: to reduce stress
to strengthen verbal ability
to encourage logical thinking

questions.prompt: What surprised the researchers about the study?

options.label: how few students managed to get A grades
the positive impact it had on physics results for women
the difference between male and female performance

questions.prompt: Greg and Lisa think Miyake's results could have been affected by

options.label: the length of the writing task
the number of students who took part
the information the students were given

questions.prompt: Greg and Lisa decide that in their own project, they will compare the effects of

options.label: two different writing tasks
a writing task with an oral task
two different oral tasks

questions.prompt: The main finding of Smolinsky's research was that class teamwork activities

options.label: were most effective when done by all-women groups
had no effect on the performance of men or women
improved the results of men more than of women

questions.prompt: What will Lisa and Greg do next?

options.label: talk to a professor
observe a science class
look at the science timetable
